name: Cumin Rice with Eggplant & Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the rice, cover it with water and set aside to soak while preparing the rest of the vegetables.
2. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
3. Warm the olive oil and butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the eggplant and onion, salt lightly, and sauté them rapidly to distribute the oil until soft but not mushy, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the peppers, tomatoes, spices (including pepper), parsley, and more salt to taste. Stir carefully, combining everything well.
6. Drain the rice and add it to the pan along with 3 cups water. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
7. Transfer everything to a baking dish such as a large earthenware gratin dish, cover with parchment, then foil.
8. Bake until the rice is done, about 45 minutes.
9. Toss any diced cheese (optional) into the rice and serve. Serves 4 as a main course or 6 to 8 as a side dish.
